channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: House GOP Cancels Friday Votes Amid SAVE America Act Standoff
item.description: House Republican leaders canceled planned votes for Friday after an internal GOP standoff over election legislation brought House business to a standstill.

item.title: DHS Sec Mullin Delivers Sharp Reply to Angry Rosa DeLauro in Heated Hearing
Reporter's Notebook: Lawmakers Debate AI's Role in America's Classrooms
item.description: The Senate is debating how AI should be used in classrooms as lawmakers raise concerns about student learning, privacy, and cognitive impacts.

item.title: New: Long Island School Clerk Caught Destroying Ballots in Election Rigging Scheme
